notes: accept marker is implemented by the native surface family
SBsql syntax future marker is implemented
SBsql syntax reserved marker is implemented
TREAT typed route changes the descriptor of the bounded value
accept feature probe returns true for a non-empty feature descriptor
any_value returns the bounded expression value
bulk_exceptions returns an empty descriptor when no bulk diagnostics exist
collect marker returns an empty JSON array
collect wraps the bounded expression value in a JSON array
domain_stack marker returns an empty stack
element uses the existing singleton multiset route
fusion uses the existing multiset route
intersection uses the existing multiset route
nvl returns the fallback for NULL first argument
void returns SQL NULL with void descriptor
